elements.content: There must be a way to solve this situation...
If everyone got different results, bridges would fall and rockets would miss the moon.

For everybody to get the same result,
we agree on a set of rules.

options: Playing Epic Minecraft Destroys All Sleep
Parenthesis Exponents Multiplication Division Addition Subtraction
Please Evade My Dangerous Attack Squirrel

Now, what's the order of operations?

en.content: In math they call me an expression.
I'm also known as a mixed operation.

options: it mixes operations such as +,-, × and ÷

elements.content: A cada parte se le llama término.

en.content: Each part is called a term.

elements.content: Una expresión es dividida en partes por + y -.

en.content: An expression is divided into parts separated by + and -.

elements.content: + & - separan los términos de una expresión.

en.content: The terms in an expression are separated by + & -

elements.content: Do you remember the order of operations?

Te dejo.
Voy a engañar a una tonta que acaba de entrar.

en.content:
I'll call you back.
A new sucker 
just walked in.

elements.content: Quiero reemplazar el vidrio y la batería de mi teléfono.

en.content: Hi. I need to replace my phone's glass and battery.

chatNodes.text:
30 $ por reparar el vidrio +
50 $ por la batería +
20 por hora de trabajo (2 horas)

30+50+20x2 
= 100 x 2
= 200

Do whatever you want.

It's still going to cost $ 200.

2 hours of labor at $ 20 each equals 40.

30+50+20x2 
= 30 + 50 + 40
= 120

I see you know your order of operations...

Ok, I'll take $ 120.

= 200

It's still going to cost $ 200.

30+50+20x2 
= 30 + 50 + 40
= 120

I see you know your order of operations...

Ok, I'll take $ 120.

options: A number multiplied by itself several times.

elements.content:
+ and -
from left to right

× and ÷
from left to right

chatNodes.text: Ok, now what we do next?

We always go left to right.
So now all we need to solve is

 11 - 5

Don't worry.
Just follow the rules.
What do we solve first?

elements.content:
It deals with exponents.

Do you know exponents?
First, solve what's inside the walls!
Inside the parenthesis the normal rules apply!
La dirección de las operaciones puede dar diferentes resultados.
El resultado es distinto según la dirección en que hagamos las operaciones.

en.content:
As we can see,
we get
different results depending on the direction.

elements.content:
Mismo problema con
la división y la multiplicación.
Para evitar diferencias, acordamos SIEMPRE hacer las operaciones de IZQUIERDA a DERECHA.

en.content:
To avoid getting
different results,
we agree to ALWAYS
order operations
LEFT to RIGHT.

en.content: Why must we do operations LEFT to RIGHT?
